title: Gmail Connection Settings UI
description: Build the Settings UI for Gmail OAuth connection. Single-click connect button, status indicator, and disconnect option.
acceptance_criteria: Settings page shows 'Connect Gmail' button when not connected
Clicking button initiates OAuth flow (opens Google consent screen)
After successful auth, status shows 'Connected' with green indicator and connected email address
Error handling: show error message if OAuth fails
completion_summary: Created GmailConnection component at src/components/settings/GmailConnection.tsx with three states: loading (spinner), connected (green indicator + email + disconnect button with confirm modal), not connected (connect button). On mount, checks oauth_tokens table for existing Gmail token row; detects ?gmail=connected callback param and cleans URL. Wired into SettingsModal.tsx between Join Household and Delete Household sections. Added 8 new i18n keys to en and he settings namespaces. data-testid attributes added for testability. All Tailwind uses logical properties (ms-/me-). Build clean, no test regressions.
notes: OAuth flow is handled by Backend agent (be-001). Connected email displayed from user.email (Supabase auth) since oauth_tokens table does not store an email column.
